spec.description: Catalog of tiered-cache keys observed in semantic_cache (L3) and the events_cache_access stream. SCD II — a key whose source_path lineage changes closes its old row, so the provenance history of every cached fact stays auditable. Conformed dimension for fact_cache_hits.

columns.name: cache_key
columns.description: namespaced cache key (ke:<lane>:<id>), natural key

columns.name: lane
columns.description: lane parsed from the key namespace; NULL when unnamespaced

columns.name: source_path
columns.description: originating repo path from semantic_cache; NULL when synthesized

columns.name: row_effective_from
columns.description: SCD II validity start

columns.name: row_effective_to
columns.description: SCD II validity end; infinity while current

columns.name: is_current
columns.description: current-row flag

spec.description: Citation memories in the managed-agents memory shape (path + content), one current row per memory path. SCD II — dreams-curated rewrites of a memory's content close the old row so curation history is auditable. Source memories are derived from csl_items; curated ones are written by the dreams consolidation job (B3).

columns.name: memory_path
columns.description: memory path (/citations/<csl-id-slug>.md), natural key

columns.name: content
columns.description: markdown memory body (citation summary + CSL-JSON block)

columns.name: csl_id
columns.description: originating csl_items.id; NULL for synthesized memories

columns.name: curation_source
columns.description: ingest | dreams | agent — who wrote this version of the memory

columns.name: row_effective_from
columns.description: SCD II validity start

spec.description: Anthropic research documents mirrored under vendor/anthropic-sitemap/{research,_pdfs}, one current row per doc. SCD II — title/abstract/URL changes close the old row and open a new one so citation provenance is auditable over crawls.

columns.name: csl_id
columns.description: CSL item id (anthropic-sitemap:research:<slug>), natural key

columns.name: title
columns.description: document H1 title at crawl time

columns.name: doc_type
columns.description: CSL type — article (research page) or document (_pdfs mirror)

columns.name: url
columns.description: live anthropic.com URL; NULL for hash-named pdf mirrors

columns.name: research_team
columns.description: owning team page (economic-research first; null when unattributed)

columns.name: issued_date
columns.description: publication date parsed from the page (NULL when undated)

columns.name: row_effective_from
columns.description: SCD II validity start

spec.description: One row per mirrored vendor under vendor/. SCD I — corpus counts and crawl freshness overwrite in place; history lives in fact_vendor_crawl, not here.

columns.name: vendor_name
columns.description: vendor directory name (natural key)

columns.name: host
columns.description: reconstructed doc host; NULL when unmapped (never guessed)

columns.name: doc_count
columns.description: tracked markdown docs in the current corpus

columns.name: last_loaded_at
columns.description: last warehouse load touching this vendor

spec.description: Append-only access log of the three-tier semantic cache. Every get/set against L1 (in-process LRU), L2 (Redis) and L3 (Postgres semantic_cache) appends one row. Never UPDATE, never DELETE — this is the raw event stream the fact_cache_hits rollup aggregates.

columns.name: cache_key
columns.description: namespaced cache key (ke:<lane>:<id>)

columns.name: tier
columns.description: cache tier the operation resolved at — L1, L2 or L3

columns.name: op
columns.description: operation outcome — hit, miss, set, invalidate or promote

columns.name: lane
columns.description: originating lane parsed from the key namespace; NULL when unnamespaced

columns.name: occurred_at
columns.description: operation wall-clock time

spec.sla_policy: append at access time via buffered sink; never mutated

grain: one row per cache operation (tier × op × cache_key × occurred_at)

spec.description: Append-only audit log of volatile→durable cache promotions. Never UPDATE, never DELETE — the promotion history is the record of what the agent fleet found durable-worthy and when.

columns.name: cache_key
columns.description: semantic_cache key that was promoted

columns.name: source_path
columns.description: originating repo path; NULL when synthesized

columns.name: agent_id
columns.description: promoting agent (session or coworker id)

columns.name: occurred_at
columns.description: promotion wall-clock time

columns.name: hits
columns.description: volatile hits carried at promotion time

spec.sla_policy: append at promotion time; never mutated

grain: one row per DurableStore.persistVolatile promotion (cache_key × occurred_at)

spec.description: Transactional ingest facts from scripts/ingest-citations.ts and scripts/warm-semantic-cache.ts. Each pipeline run appends one row per document touched, carrying size and extraction measures.

columns.name: doc_sk
columns.description: FK → dw.dim_research_doc.surrogate_key

columns.name: date_key
columns.description: FK → dw.dim_date.date_key (YYYYMMDD of the ingest run)

columns.name: ingest_run_at
columns.description: pipeline run wall-clock start

columns.name: markdown_bytes
columns.description: size of the mirrored markdown body at ingest

columns.name: fields_extracted
columns.description: count of CSL fields populated (title/abstract/issued/URL)

columns.name: extraction_completeness
columns.description: fields_extracted over the 4 extractable CSL fields

grain: one row per research document per ingest run (csl_id × ingest_run_at)

spec.description: Transactional log of research-agent reads of citation memories. The dreams job (B3) aggregates access frequency to decide which memories to consolidate, expand, or retire.

columns.name: memory_sk
columns.description: FK → dw.dim_memory.surrogate_key

columns.name: agent_id
columns.description: reading agent (session or coworker id)

columns.name: date_key
columns.description: FK-style YYYYMMDD of the access

columns.name: accessed_at
columns.description: access wall-clock time

columns.name: access_count
columns.description: accesses recorded in this row (batched writers may roll up)

grain: one row per memory access (memory_sk × accessed_at)

spec.description: Transactional load facts per vendor per run — corpus size and citation extraction quality over time across all 34 mirrored vendors.

columns.name: vendor_name
columns.description: FK-style → dw.dim_vendor.vendor_name

columns.name: date_key
columns.description: YYYYMMDD of the load run

columns.name: loaded_at
columns.description: load run wall-clock start

columns.name: doc_count
columns.description: docs in this vendor's corpus at load time

columns.name: dated_count
columns.description: docs with a parsed issued date

columns.name: dated_share
columns.description: dated_count over doc_count

grain: one row per vendor per warehouse load (vendor_name × loaded_at)

spec.description: Predefined aggregation — citable research output per Anthropic research team page (economic-research first), refreshed after each ingest run.

columns.name: research_team
columns.description: team slug from dim_research_doc.research_team

columns.name: doc_count
columns.description: distinct current docs attributed to the team

spec.description: Predefined aggregation — citable research output per publication year, refreshed after each ingest run. Backs the researcher-facing frontend so the SPA never aggregates raw facts client-side.

columns.name: issued_year
columns.description: publication year from dim_research_doc.issued_date

columns.name: doc_count
columns.description: distinct research docs published in the year

columns.name: dated_share
columns.description: share of corpus docs carrying a parseable issued date

spec.description: Predefined aggregation — last load time and run count per vendor, the freshness signal paying crawlers and the 24/7 loop key off.

columns.name: vendor_name
columns.description: vendor directory name

columns.name: last_loaded_at
columns.description: most recent fact_vendor_crawl.loaded_at

columns.name: load_runs
columns.description: total load runs recorded for the vendor

columns.name: latest_doc_count
columns.description: doc_count at the most recent load
